overview: Nexus is a full-featured placement management platform for students and admins. The student dashboard provides rich analytics, KPI cards with sparklines, placement trends, interview prep, skill gap analysis, company insights, and peer benchmarking — all with a blue OKLCH theme and smooth animations.
features: Rich student dashboard with 6 animated KPI cards and sparklines
Placement trend and company tier accessibility charts
Applications hub with filterable table and status timeline
Interview prep with performance tracking and skill analysis
Analytics insights with peer comparison and skill gap heatmap
Sidebar with 6 nav sections linking to all student sub-routes
Blue OKLCH theme with Framer Motion animations
Admin dashboard with war-room analytics and placement management
